data.name: Nexus of Fate
data.detailed_description:
Story:

When life throws an unexpected end your way, fate grants you a new chance... and more. In this game, you take on the role of an ordinary student who finds himself in paradise after a tragic accident. There, he is welcomed by not one but several enchanting goddesses, ready to fulfill his every desire.

But nothing comes easy — each goddess has prepared unique trials for you. Can you prove your resilience, wit, and... creativity to earn your reward? The challenges will be intense, and the desires... deeply personal. Remember: everything you dream of can become a reality. 100%.

So, are you ready to step into a game where your fantasies come true, and every encounter with a goddess is a chapter of unforgettable adventure?

Gameplay:

Nexus of Fate combines the immersive storytelling of a visual novel with engaging Sokoban-style puzzles.

Game Features:

  • A captivating isekai story with humor and romance.

  • Unique goddesses, each with their own character and challenges.

  • Thought-provoking Sokoban-style puzzles.

  • Musical accompaniment.

  • Stunning CG illustrations that highlight key moments of the story.

data.short_description: After a tragic death, you find yourself in paradise, greeted by enchanting goddesses ready to fulfill any wish. But first, you'll need to overcome their challenging trials. Each one brings you closer to your ultimate goal: seeing your deepest fantasies come true.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 俄文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-6100 / AMD FX-8350
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1650
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4670K / AMD Ryzen 5 1500X
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce RTX 3050
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:

  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-6100 / AMD FX-8350
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 1650
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

  • Processor: Intel Core i5-4670K / AMD Ryzen 5 1500X
